summary: Iteration 212: Phase D Intake Learning Feedback Loop - All tests passed. Backend: 19/19 pytest unit tests + 14/14 API integration tests. Fixed KeyError bug in run_pattern_hygiene. Frontend: Pattern Health panel, 4 counters, per-customer table, recent feedback feed, and Pattern hygiene button all verified. Version v2.3.0 confirmed.

issues: Minor React hydration warning about <tr> inside <span> in tbody - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed KeyError bug in intake_learning_feedback_service.py line 408: changed ln['accept_count'] to accept_count variable using .get() for safe access
All 6 feedback event types working: suggestion_accepted, suggestion_rejected, bounds_violation_confirmed, bounds_violation_overridden, unmatched_item_confirmed_new, unmatched_item_mapped
Invalid event_type correctly returns 400 with list of valid types
Pattern health endpoint returns correct shape: summary (trusted/drifting/retired/unscored/total), per_customer array, recent_events array
Hygiene endpoint returns correct shape: patterns_scanned, retired, promoted, ran_at
Events endpoint returns events sorted by created_at DESC (most recent first)
Version v2.3.0 confirmed in frontend header and version.js
seed_data_creation: Feedback events created for C-10250 customer during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 212 verified Phase D feedback loop. All feedback event types tested via API. Pattern Health panel shows: Trusted=0, Drifting=1, Retired=1, Unscored=14 for customer C-10250 with 16 patterns. Recent feedback feed shows all test events. Bug fixed: KeyError in run_pattern_hygiene when accessing accept_count on patterns without feedback history. IntakeLearningPanel feedback buttons (sug-accept-*, sug-reject-*, bounds-confirm-*, bounds-override-*, item-confirm-*) not tested directly as no documents with actionable intake_insights exist in system, but API endpoints verified working.

bug_fixed.issue: KeyError: 'accept_count' when running pattern hygiene on patterns without feedback history
bug_fixed.fix: Changed direct dictionary access ln['accept_count'] to use .get() method with default value 0

notes: Phase D feedback loop fully functional. Every reviewer click (accept/reject/override) is captured as training data in intake_learning_events collection. Pattern confidence auto-adapts based on feedback. Pattern Health dashboard shows real-time trust/drift/retire status. IntakeLearningPanel feedback buttons exist in code but could not be tested directly as no documents with actionable intake_insights (suggested_lines, bounds_violations, unmatched_items) exist in the system.
